ref: Jour: European Physical Journal A: Hadrons and Nuclei, Vol.60, p.217 (2024)
title: 18F alpha cluster structure in the resonant 14N+alpha scattering

x4freetext: 18F alpha cluster structure in the resonant 14N+alpha

x4codes.hlp: Universita degli Studi di Enna "Kore", Enna, Italy
INFN Laboratori Nazionali del Sud, Catania, Italy
Texas A & M University, College Station, TX, United States of America

x4freetext: Chamber filled with high-purity (99.99%) helium gas
acting as both a target and a degrader for the beam.
With a gas pressure of 260 torr, the beam was stopped
at 5 mm in front of the central detectors.
Ten silicon detectors of with an active area of
10x10 mm2 and a thickness of 350 um placed at the
rear of the scattering chamber to detect particles at
The precision of energy calibration is ~20 keV, and
the energy resolution is about 35 keV at 180 deg
which deteriorates to 45 keV at larger angles
Uncertainty of the absolute cross section
